# Day log — 2026-05-16

## Done
- Налаштували Redis-черги для фонових задач (background job queue).
- Investigated a memory leak in the worker process; root cause was an
  unbounded in-process cache. Fixed by adding an LRU with max size.

## Decisions
- Worker concurrency capped at 4 per node to avoid OOM on the Swarm nodes.

## Commits
- `fix: bound worker cache with LRU to stop the memory leak`
- `chore: tune worker concurrency for swarm nodes`
